creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
php74-ports were removed a mere month after the upstream's EOL:

 commit 0d310d700aa060b02feec9c7487893a983bf7098
 Author: Muhammad Moinur Rahman <bofh@FreeBSD.org>
 Date:   Sun Dec 25 13:34:18 2022 -0600

    */*php74*: Sunset php 7.4
    
    As per upstream php 7.4 has reached it's EOL on 2022-11-22. Remove php74
    from the tree. Default version of php has already been switched to 8.1.
    
    Approved by:    portmgr (blanket infrastructure)
    Sponsored by:   Bounce Experts

The haste was unseemly -- and provides a good argument for NOT using FreeBSD "in real life"... No one needs a server *by itself*. No one needs PHP by itself.

What people use servers for, is to run APPLICATIONS -- including those written in PHP, such as ownCloud. And we can't -- because someone was so trigger-happy...

Yes, I'm ranting. Yes, I know, the rant is unlikely to fix this problem -- the one with ownCloud.

But I do think, expressing such -- very well deserved -- negative reaction will help prevent future problems of this nature...

> Good luck, sunpoet!

Indeed...
